title: calea ulei
intro: Calea ulei, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or Kava Tree, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its sedative and anti-anxiety properties, attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Calea ulei have been associated with various health benefits, including reduced stress and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and relief from muscle pain and inflammation. Calea ulei is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
